member.name: T:QuickBite.Order.API.Controllers.OrderController
member.summary: Exposes /api/v1/orders endpoints for placement, retrieval, status management, agent assignment, cancellation, and reorder.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Order.API.Controllers.OrderController.Cancel(System.Guid,QuickBite.Order.Application.DTOs.CancelOrderRequestDto)
member.summary: cancel an order (refund triggered for prepaid orders).

member.name: M:QuickBite.Order.API.Controllers.OrderController.Reorder(QuickBite.Order.Application.DTOs.ReorderRequestDto)
member.summary: POST /api/v1/orders/reorder - place a new order from a previous one.

member.name: M:QuickBite.Order.API.Controllers.OrderController.GetOrderCount(System.Guid)
member.summary: GET /api/v1/orders/count/{restaurantId} - total order count for a restaurant.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
